caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political discussions under the title "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu." The scene features an older man dressed in traditional attire, seated and speaking into a microphone, likely addressing the audience or participating in an interview. On the right side of the screen, there is a smaller inset image showing Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is presumably contributing to the discussion via phone. The background includes a red and purple design with the PlusTV logo prominently displayed. The lower third of the screen provides additional information, including the program's name, "Plus Politics," and prompts viewers to watch online or subscribe to their YouTube channel. The overall setting suggests a formal and professional broadcast environment aimed at discussing current political issues in Nigeria.
